title: McAlive:Grass
description: This texture pack animates grass based on the biome and height, also changes their model
body:
# This texture pack animates grass,changes their model and makes the world of minecraft more well **ALIVE**
## There are 3 versions:
**- 1.Height version**:Animates grass based on height **REQUIRES CONTINUITY OR OPTIFINE**

**- 2.Looped version**:Grass has looping animation just like in plains in the trailer no matter the height

**- 3.3sec version**:Grass animates every 3 sec just like in forest in the trailer no matter the height

**Check out the trailer for the pack!**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/q_dSi-dKbCQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
